fingerprint_summary: ASP.NET/MVC eDocs public search; docketTable grid; pager5 postback. Party search defaults to CRIMINAL bonds — MUST set ddlCourtTypeParty=CivilOnly. Pager needs explicit '»' click + navigation-race retry. Local Playwright (+--no-sandbox).
notes: Earlier recon 'session-gated' label is STALE — gate is open. CivilOnly filter yields real civil foreclosure/probate/tax dockets.
